Select Theme

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AlgorithmComparisonManager
    Run multiple sequence scoring algorithms against the same query and database.
    DNASearchComparison
    Demonstrate searching a DNA database with multiple scoring algorithms.
    DNASearchDemo
    Demonstrate searching a DNA database with multiple scoring algorithms.
    DNASequence
    Represent one labeled DNA sequence in the database.
    ExamplePositionMatchAlgorithm
    A simple example similarity algorithm.
    Levenshtein
    Algorithm that scores two DNA sequences using Levenshtein edit distance.
    LongestCommonSubsequence
    Algorithm that scores two DNA sequences by the length of their longest common subsequence (the longest sequence of characters shared by both strings, not necessarily contiguous).
    LongestCommonSubstring
    Algorithm that scores two DNA sequences by the length of their longest common substring (a contiguous sequence of characters shared by both strings).
    MatchResult
    Store the result of a sequence search.
    SequenceMatcher
    Searches a database of DNA sequences using a provided scoring algorithm.
    SequenceMatcherTest
    Tests for the SequenceMatcher class.
    SequenceScoringAlgorithm
    Defines the behavior for a DNA sequence scoring algorithm.
